claim_boundary: Sensitivity outputs compare modeling assumptions and do not establish empirical validity.

cobb_douglas.description: Multiplicative baseline used by the paper.

weighted_geometric.description: Normalized weighted geometric mean with the same elasticity proportions.

weighted_additive.description: Additive comparator that permits substitution among institutional inputs.

bottleneck_minimum.description: Leontief-style comparator governed by the weakest normalized input.

figure.title: Synthetic GCAT Governance Load Regime Map
figure.subtitle: Baseline Cobb-Douglas capacity; Omega > 1 denotes modeled overload, not proven drift
